# Clyde Arrives -- cutscene and double battle

alias buster npc5
alias clyde npc6

# test

label LakeElixSouth_ClydeArrives
# Buster hears a voice
buster emote ?
# Buster and player both look south
buster face down + player face down
# Clyde runs in from off-screen (7 tiles north)
clyde walkfast up 7
msg "???: BUSTER! I'm here!\nI'm here! Sorry I'm late!$"
# Banter 1: Clyde notices Koffing
msg "???: I got held up at the--$"
# Clyde looks at player, then back at Buster
clyde face player
pause
pause
clyde face up
clyde emote ?
msg "???: ... Why is your KOFFING on\nthe ground?$"
# Banter 2: Buster explains
clyde face player
clyde emote !
msg "BUSTER: They had TWO POKeMON!\nTWO! Against my one!\pIt was totally unfair, CLYDE.$"
# Banter 3: The difference
msg "CLYDE: ...So you lost a\ntwo-on-one.$"
buster emote !
msg "BUSTER: I lost a ONE-on-two!\nThere's a difference!$"
buster emote !
msg "CLYDE: There really isn't.$"
# Revival Herb
clyde walk up 1
msg "CLYDE: Here. Give KOFFING this\nREVIVAL HERB. It'll fix him up.$"
clyde walk down 1
msg "BUSTER: Are those the cheap ones\nthat taste horrible?$"
msg "THIS IS THE TEST DIALOGUE$"
clyde emote ?
msg "CLYDE: They work, don't they?\nJust shove it in his mouth.$"
# Herb reaction and duo battle
msg "BUSTER forced the REVIVAL HERB\ninto KOFFING's mouth.\pKOFFING woke up!\pKOFFING does not look happy\nabout this.$"
msg "CLYDE: Right then. Two on two.\nFair and square this time.\pBUSTER: Yeah! Now you'll see\nwhat TEAM ROCKET can really do!$"
trainerbattle_double TRAINER_ROCKET_DUO_1, LakeElixSouth_Clyde_BattleIntro, LakeElixSouth_Duo_Defeat, LakeElixSouth_NotEnoughMons, LakeElixSouth_AfterDuoBattle
pory release
pory end

label LakeElixSouth_AfterDuoBattle
msg "BUSTER: I can't believe it...\nBeaten twice in one day...\pCLYDE: Buster. That fighting\nstyle. Those POKeMON...\pCLYDE: Do you know who that is?$"
msg "BUSTER: ... No?\pCLYDE: That's the CHAMPION,\nyou absolute moron.\pBUSTER: The... the CHAMPION?!\nTHE CHAMPION?!\pBUSTER: Why didn't you say\nsomething BEFORE the battle?!$"
msg "CLYDE: I got here AFTER the\nbattle, genius.\pCLYDE: ...We should leave.\nNow.\pBUSTER: Y-yeah. Good idea.\nVery good idea. BYE!$"
sound SE_EXIT
fade black
flag set FLAG_BEAT_ROCKET_DUO_1
hide buster
hide clyde
fade in
pory release
pory end
